typecheck.command: cd /Users/anas/Documents/Factory && ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && cd "$ROOT/erp-domain" && MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -T5 compile -q

lint.command: cd /Users/anas/Documents/Factory && bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

blockingIssues.description: `GET /api/v1/companies` still returns `companyService.findAll()` to any `ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN`, leaving a non-canonical cross-tenant inventory surface outside `/api/v1/superadmin/**` and keeping the platform privacy-wall hard cut incomplete.

`CompanyControllerIT.list_companies_returns_all_tenants_for_root_only_super_admin` codifies the surviving `/api/v1/companies` superadmin inventory behavior instead of proving that the alias fails closed.

rejectedObservations.observation: The mission architecture defines `/api/v1/superadmin/**` as the canonical platform control-plane host, but no shared-state note or guard explains whether `GET /api/v1/companies` is an intentional exception.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as a shared-state update because the mission guidance already defines the canonical host; the surviving `/api/v1/companies` behavior is a feature-specific blocking defect captured in the review rather than new reusable guidance.
